rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SANDRA FAYE MATTOS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Continued to December 7, 2016. The notice given to the 3 additional heirs was defective as the Proof of Service shows the Notice of Petition to Administer Estate sent (DE-121) was the one filed 9/27/16, which had a hearing date of 9/21/16. A new DE-121 must be sent with the new hearing date. The new Proof of Service filed must include a copy of the new DE-121. The new POS must be filed by Friday, December 2. The Court to determine if it is satisfied with the efforts to locate paternal heirs at the hearing.
